prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大 学排名2026年约第60名，近年排名稳定在46–61区间，属中上水平综合类大学；2026年高考周期声誉评价为「明显负面」，主要涉及学术不端事件（院长论文造 假等），可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；抖音热度总排名第48位，评价「较热」，短视频曝光量中等；第五轮学科评估中社会学获评A、世界史获评A- ，共2个A-及以上学科；社会学与该校人文社科类招生专业直接关联，对文科组报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续 偏热（2024–2026年均高热推荐），与该校理学工学I/II/III类招生方向高度匹配；河南省2026年高考总人数约120万，按2025年分科比例估算物理类约73.4万人，较2025年（55.5 万）增长约32%，竞争显著加剧，2025年物理类本科批427分、特殊类型535分，近年波动不大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次18242名、2026年扩招13.1 %（位次后移信号）与河南省物理类考生大幅增长约32%（竞争加剧信号），考生增长效应强于扩招效应，叠加声誉负面舆情对报考热度的潜在抑制，预计2026年最低录取位次较20 25年有所后移但幅度有限；预测最低位次约19377名，区间18877–19877名。

- 通信工程（卓越工程师班）

- 电气类（理学工学Ⅰ类）（含机械、自动化等）
- 理科试验班类（含数学、物理、力学）

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 13845 → 21800 → 16466 → 17519 → 18242, showing a fluctuating and slightly declining trend; in 2022, an abnormally high ranking (21800) occurred due to the size-year effect; in the recent 3 years (2023–2025), it stabilized in the 16466–18242 range, with a 2025 baseline of about 18242; the university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Henan Province was 201 in 2021 → 186 in 2022 → 178 in 2023 → 175 in 2024 → 183 in 2025, and the 2026 plan increases to 207, an expansion of 24 students (+13.1%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it is approximately 60th, with recent rankings stable in the 46–61 range, making it a mid-to-upper level comprehensive university; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative,' mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (dean's paper forgery, etc.), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; its Douyin popularity ranks 48th overall, with an evaluation of 'relatively hot' and moderate short video exposure; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, sociology received an A rating and world history received an A- rating, totaling 2 disciplines at A- or above; sociology is directly related to the university's humanities and social sciences enrollment categories, which has some appeal for liberal arts group applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as electronic information/communication and electrical engineering continue to be highly popular (highly recommended from 2024 to 2026), closely matching the university's science and engineering I/II/III enrollment directions; in 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Henan Province is about 1.2 million, and based on the 2025 subject ratio estimate, physics category candidates are about 734,000, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (555,000), significantly intensifying competition; in 2025, the physics category undergraduate batch score was 427 points, and the special type batch was 535 points, with little fluctuation in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 18242, the 13.1% enrollment expansion in 2026 (a signal of ranking decline), and the significant increase of about 32% in physics category candidates in Henan Province (a signal of intensified competition), the candidate growth effect outweighs the expansion effect; combined with the potential suppression of application enthusiasm due to negative reputation incidents, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to decline compared to 2025 but to a limited extent; the predicted minimum ranking is about 19377, with a range of 18877–19877.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electronic Information Engineering (Excellent Engineer Class)
- Communication Engineering (Excellent Engineer Class)
- Electronic Information (Future Technology College) (including Mechatronic Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Robot Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information (Science and Engineering III) (including Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
- Electrical (Science and Engineering I) (including Mechanical Engineering, Automation, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (including Mathematics, Physics, Mechanics)
- Science Experimental Class (Qian Weichang College) (including Material Design, Microelectronics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials (Science and Engineering II) (including Chemical Engineering, Bioengineering, etc.)
- Economics (Economics and Management) (including Finance, Accounting, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 19377, with a range of 18877–19877. Candidates with rankings within the lower bound (18877) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Electronic Information Excellent Engineer Class and Future Technology College majors; candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 19377) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 Science and Engineering categories, while also considering Tier 1 Electronic Information (III) with relatively lower rankings; candidates near the upper bound (19877) should use Tier 3 Materials and Economics as safety options, while also paying attention to Tier 2 Electrical with a wider ranking range.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 2133 → 1979 → 1954 → 2620 (regular category) → 2375, fluctuating within the 1900–2600 range. In 2024, due to batch consolidation, the ranking shifted backward (2620), and in 2025 it recovered to 2375. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Henan Province was 15 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 12 in 2024, sharply decreased to 5 in 2025, and further reduced to 3 in 2026, a decrease of 2 students (-40%) compared to 2025. The significant enrollment reduction greatly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it is approximately 60th, placing it in the upper-middle tier of comprehensive universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative,' mainly due to academic misconduct incidents, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranks 48th overall, with an evaluation of 'relatively hot.' Sociology is rated A, and World History is rated A-, which highly matches the university's Humanities Experimental Class (including Sociology, History, etc.), strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Sociology and History have stable and slightly recommended social popularity. In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination takers in Henan Province is approximately 1.2 million. Based on the 2025 subject ratio, the history category is estimated to have about 466,000 candidates, an increase of about 32% from 2025 (352,000), intensifying competition. The provincial control line for the history category in 2025 was 471 points for the undergraduate batch and 552 points for the special type, with little fluctuation in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2375, the significant 40% enrollment reduction in 2026 (a strong signal for ranking advancement), and the approximately 32% increase in history category candidates in Henan Province (a signal of intensified competition), the enrollment reduction effect far outweighs the candidate growth effect. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will significantly advance compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1755, with a range of 1439–2071.
